description: Move all skill directories into a unified skills/ directory at root, update all code references, and ensure all 894 tests pass.
steps: Step 1: Create skills/ directory at project root.

Step 2: Move these 18 root-level skill directories into skills/: ai-code-guidance, ai-product, caveman, diagnose, grill-me, grill-with-docs, handoff, improve-codebase-architecture, prototype, relentless-iteration, setup-matt-pocock-skills, tdd, to-issues, to-prd, triage, web-scraper, write-a-skill, xhs_collector, zoom-out. Use 'git mv' to preserve history.

Step 3: Move these 9 skill directories from knowledge/skills/ into skills/: ralph, prd, ui-ux-pro-max, ui-styling, design-system, design, brand, banner-design, slides. Use 'git mv' to preserve history.

Step 4: Move knowledge/skills/_index.yaml to skills/_index.yaml. Update all path values in _index.yaml items to be relative to the new skills/ directory. Skills that were in knowledge/skills/ (ralph, prd, etc.) had paths like 'knowledge/skills/ralph' - change to just 'ralph'. Skills that were at root (grill-me, tdd etc.) had paths like 'grill-me' - keep as 'grill-me' (they are now at skills/grill-me).
Step 5: Remove the now-empty knowledge/skills/ directory.

Step 6: Update knowledge/store.py - KnowledgeStore.__init__ to accept an optional skills_dir parameter that defaults to the new location (project_root/skills/). Change self.skills_dir from 'self.knowledge_root / "skills"' to use the new default. The default should be knowledge_root.parent / 'skills' since knowledge_root is the knowledge/ directory and skills/ is a sibling.

Step 7: Update knowledge/skill_composer.py - get_skill_content() method. Currently it tries self.knowledge_store.skills_dir / skill_path / 'SKILL.md' and then repo_root / skill_path / 'SKILL.md'. Since all skills are now under skills/ and skills_dir points there, the first lookup (skills_dir / skill_path) should work for all skills. Keep the fallback for safety.

Step 8: Update kernel/skill_factory.py - SkillFactory.create_skill() method. Currently creates skills at self.knowledge_dir / 'skills' / name. Update to create skills in the new skills/ directory (knowledge_dir parent / 'skills' / name). Also update self.store initialization if needed.

Step 9: Update setup_check.py - check_skill_paths() method. Currently looks for _index.yaml at self.root / 'knowledge' / 'skills' / '_index.yaml'. Update to self.root / 'skills' / '_index.yaml'. Update the path resolution logic to check self.root / path (since paths in _index.yaml are now relative to skills/ which is the skill name).

Step 10: Update kernel/workflow_bridge.py - the constructor takes skill_index_path. No code change needed in this file since it receives the path as a parameter, but check runner.py where it's instantiated.
Step 11: Update runner.py - if it instantiates WorkflowBridge with the old path, update to use the new skills/_index.yaml path.
Step 12: Update kernel/error_messages.py - change the string 'knowledge/skills/' to 'skills/' in the skill_not_found error message.
Step 13: Update tests/conftest.py - the tmp_knowledge fixture creates knowledge_dir/skills/. Add a separate skills dir at tmp_path/skills/ for tests that need it, or adjust the KnowledgeStore init.

Step 14: Update tests/test_setup_check.py - test_passes_with_valid_skill_paths and test_fails_with_missing_skill_dirs currently create knowledge/skills/ structure. Update to create skills/ at root with paths like 'skills/ralph' in the _index.yaml, and create the _index.yaml at tmp_path/skills/_index.yaml.

Step 15: Update tests/test_knowledge.py - test_skill_md_files_resolve() currently checks knowledge/skills/{path}/SKILL.md and {path}/SKILL.md. Update to check skills/{path}/SKILL.md (relative to kernel_root). Also update test_skill_index_has_required_fields if it references knowledge/skills/_index.yaml.
Step 16: Update tests/test_skill_factory.py - tests that assert skill creation path. Skills are now created at project_root/skills/ instead of knowledge_dir/skills/.
Step 17: Update README.md - change the Contributing section that says 'Create a directory under knowledge/skills/' to say 'Create a directory under skills/'. Update the _index.yaml path reference.
Step 18: Run the full test suite 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' and fix any remaining broken paths until all 894 tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: All 18 root-level skill directories exist under skills/ and are removed from root
All 9 knowledge/skills/ skill directories exist under skills/ and knowledge/skills/ no longer exists
skills/_index.yaml exists with correct paths for all 28 skills
knowledge/ still contains store.py, skill_composer.py, __init__.py, rules/, patterns/ (but NOT skills/)
KnowledgeStore.__init__ accepts optional skills_dir parameter defaulting to project_root/skills/
Running 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' passes all 894 tests
setup_check.py validates skill paths against the new skills/_index.yaml location
verification: Run 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' - all 894 tests must pass
Run 'python setup_check.py' - all checks should pass
Verify 'ls skills/' shows all 27+ skill directories
Verify 'ls knowledge/' shows store.py, skill_composer.py, __init__.py, rules/, patterns/ but NOT skills/
findings: All 894 tests pass. setup_check.py validates all 28 skill paths. The KnowledgeStore now accepts an optional skills_dir parameter for flexibility. Tests needed updates to create skills/ as a sibling of knowledge/ at the tmp_path level rather than inside knowledge/. The skill_composer fallback path (repo_root / skill_path / SKILL.md) still works for edge cases but is no longer needed since all skills are now under skills/.
